architecture.summary: Add --reorganize-specs flag to migrate-to-umbrella CLI command. Extend MigrationOptions type. New reorganizeSpecs() function moves .specweave/docs/internal/specs/{project}/FS-XXX folders to per-repo .specweave/docs/internal/specs/ directories. Enable multiProject.enabled=true in umbrella config.json. Existing living-docs-sync.ts already handles project-specific paths.

integrations.summary: Integrates with: migrate-to-umbrella CLI (new flag), config.json multiProject toggle, living-docs-sync (verify sync works post-migration), specweave archive command (per-repo spec paths). No external API integrations needed.

ui-ux.summary: CLI-only UX. Dry-run by default shows what specs move where. --execute to apply. Clear output showing source/dest for each FS-XXX folder. Summary count at end.

performance.summary: Spec folders are small metadata files. ~30 FS-XXX folders to move. No performance concerns -- simple filesystem copy/move operations.

security.summary: No security implications -- local filesystem operations only. Backup before move. No credentials or secrets involved.

edge-cases.summary: Edge cases: specs with unknown project mapping (fallback to umbrella root), partially moved specs (idempotent re-run), child repo missing .specweave/docs dir (auto-create), running from non-umbrella project (error message), FS-XXX folders with assets subdir (preserve hierarchy).
